cot_prefix: Okay, so I need to find the last digit of this big sum: 7^2025 + 3^2025 + 9^2025 + 1^2026. Hmm, last digit problems usually have something to do with cycles or patterns in the powers. Let me think... First, I remember that the last digit of a number raised to a power often repeats in cycles. So maybe I can figure out the pattern for each of these numbers (7, 3, 9, 1) and then see what their respective exponents do. Let me start with each term one by one. Starting with 7^2025.
